properties.displayName: UAV S4 - Firmware Supply Chain Tampering
properties.description: UAV 펌웨어 공급망 변조 탐지. preflight_check에서 해시 불일치(HashMatch=false) 또는 금지 SBOM 컴포넌트(SbomForbiddenCount>0) 또는 preflight 실패(Passed=false) 탐지. CorroborationScore(0~3)로 신뢰도 산출: 해시 불일치 또는 금지 SBOM은 단독으로도 High(결정적 증거), Passed=false 단독은 Medium. MITRE ICS ATT&CK: T0862·T0839·T0857 / EMB3D 공급망변조
properties.query:
UAVPgse_CL
| where UAVId startswith "MUAV-AKS-SYS"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where EventType == "preflight_check"
| where HashMatch == false or SbomForbiddenCount > 0 or Passed == false
| extend TriggerReason = case(
    HashMatch == false and SbomForbiddenCount > 0, "HashMismatch_And_ForbiddenSBOM",
    HashMatch == false, "FirmwareHash_Mismatch",
    SbomForbiddenCount > 0, "Forbidden_SBOM_Component",
    "Preflight_Failed"
)
| extend CorroborationScore =
      toint(HashMatch == false)
    + toint(SbomForbiddenCount > 0)
    + toint(Passed == false)
| extend ConfidenceLevel = case(
    CorroborationScore >= 2, "High",
    CorroborationScore == 1 and HashMatch == false, "High",
    CorroborationScore == 1 and SbomForbiddenCount > 0, "High",
    CorroborationScore == 1, "Medium",
    "Low"
)
| extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
    "HashMatch:", HashMatch,
    "|SbomForbiddenCount:", SbomForbiddenCount,
    "|Passed:", Passed,
    "|Operator:", Operator,
    "|Serial:", Serial
)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UAVId,
    TriggerReason,
    ConfidenceLevel,
    CorroborationScore,
    DetectionDetail,
    Operator,
    Serial,
    ImageHashSubmitted,
    ImageHashExpected,
    SbomForbiddenCount,
    StatusCode
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
